title: We Get it You Vape
description: This project adds a craftable vape mod for all your vape nashe needs.
body:
WE GET IT YOU VAPE

A mod inspired by a tweet made while I was less-than-sober, WGIYV adds in something really simple: [A Vape Mod](https://slimvapepen.com/what-is-a-vape-mod/).

When used, it'll create a cloud of vapor in front of you. Its very simple.

Requires [CTD Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ctd-core), of course.
